name: daily
description: Personal daily tools: TODO.md management (natural-language add/complete/delete/update) and spawn-remote (start another Codex/Claude session in a detached tmux over SSH for parallel remote work).

interface.longDescription: Personal daily tools for managing TODO.md via natural language and spawning sibling Codex/Claude sessions in detached tmux for parallel remote work. Ported from the corresponding Claude Code plugin at github.com/wenhaochai/claude-plugins.
